info.description: Video on Demand streaming platform API
info.title: Zencial VOD API

post.description: Create multiple genres in a single request (admin only). Returns succeeded and failed entries.
Remove multiple genres in a single request (admin only). Returns succeeded and failed entries.

get.description: Return a paginated list of all plans, including inactive ones (admin only)

post.description: Create a new subscription for a user against a plan (admin only)

delete.description: Cancel an existing subscription by its ID (admin only)

get.description: Return a paginated list of users (admin only)

post.description: Create a new user account (admin only)

get.description: Return a single user by their UUID (admin only)

put.description: Update a user's profile, email, role, or password (admin only)
Activate or suspend a user (admin only)

get.description: Return all subscriptions for the given user (admin only)
Return the given user's started-but-unfinished videos (admin only).
Return the given user's watchlist as a paginated list of videos (admin only).
Return a paginated list of videos in any status, including drafts and archived (admin only)

post.description: Archive multiple videos in a single request (admin only). Returns succeeded and failed entries.
Publish multiple videos in a single request (admin only). Returns succeeded and failed entries.
Restore multiple archived videos in a single request (admin only). Returns succeeded and failed entries.
Authenticate with email and password, returns tokens
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new token pair
Create a new user account and return authentication tokens

get.description: Return a paginated list of genres with optional filtering and sorting

post.description: Create a new genre with translations (admin only)

get.description: Return a single genre by its UUID

put.description: Update an existing genre's slug and translations (admin only)

delete.description: Remove a genre by its UUID (admin only)

post.description: Internal CDN callback that reports the final status of a transcode job. Authenticated via the internal shared-secret middleware, not BearerAuth.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile
Return the authenticated user's currently active subscription, or null if none.
Return videos the authenticated user has started but not finished, ordered by most recently watched.
Returns the authenticated user's last saved playback position for the video.
get.summary: Get my saved progress for a video

put.description: Create or update the authenticated user's playback position for the video. Idempotent.
put.summary: Save my progress for a video

delete.description: Remove the authenticated user's saved playback position for the video.
delete.summary: Clear my progress for a video

get.description: Return the authenticated user's watchlist as a paginated list of videos, ordered by add date (newest first).
Returns 200 with in_watchlist=true if the video is in the authenticated user's watchlist, otherwise 404.

post.description: Add the given video to the authenticated user's watchlist. Idempotent — re-adding an existing entry is a no-op.
post.summary: Add a video to my watchlist

delete.description: Remove the given video from the authenticated user's watchlist. Returns 404 when the entry does not exist.
delete.summary: Remove a video from my watchlist

get.description: Return all currently active subscription plans

post.description: Create a new subscription plan (admin only)

get.description: Return a single plan by its UUID (admin only)

put.description: Update an existing subscription plan (admin only)

get.description: Return a paginated list of published videos. With a valid bearer token, is_accessible is populated per item based on plan level.

post.description: Upload a video file with metadata via multipart form (admin only). Optional thumbnail can be sent in the same request.

parameters.description: Content rating (G, PG, PG13, R, NC17)
parameters.name: content_rating

parameters.description: Minimum plan level required to watch
parameters.name: minimum_plan_level

get.description: Return a single video by its UUID. With a valid bearer token the response includes is_accessible based on the user's plan.

put.description: Update an existing video's metadata (admin only)

delete.description: Soft-delete a video by archiving it. Files are moved to a deleted/ prefix and the status changes to archived (admin only).

post.description: Transition a video to the published state (admin only)

get.description: Return a presigned URL (or HLS manifest URL) the authenticated user can use to stream the video.

put.description: Replace a video's thumbnail image via multipart form (admin only)

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted (archived) video back to draft status (admin only)

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
